languages.text: "Высоко ценю продуктивность наших с вами бесед, Вольный Торговец, хоть и не могу не констатировать, что юмор мирян мне не близок". {n}Похоже, ваша насмешка над Нунциусом несколько задела манипулуса за живое.{/n} "Тем не менее, выражаю вам искреннюю благодарность за приглашение, как и мой коллега. Ему нечасто выпадает возможность общения с мирянами вашего статуса".

"I highly value the productivity of our conversations, Rogue Trader, though I must admit that I do not see the appeal of layperson humour." {n}Your mockery of Nuncius seems to have struck a nerve with the Manipulus.{/n} "Nevertheless, I offer my sincere thanks to you for the invitation, as does my colleague. He does not often get the opportunity to socialise with laypersons of your status."
languages.original_text: "Высоко ценю продуктивность наших с вами бесед, Вольный Торговец, хоть и не могу не констатировать, что юмор мирян мне не близок". {n}Похоже, ваша насмешка над Нунциусом несколько задела манипулуса за живое.{/n} "Тем не менее, выражаю вам искреннюю благодарность за приглашение, как и мой коллега. Ему нечасто выпадает возможность общения с мирянами вашего статуса".

He does not often get the opportunity to socialise with laypersons of your status."

"I highly value the productivity of our conversations, Rogue Trader, though I must admit that I do not see the appeal of layperson humour." {n}Your mockery of Nuncius seems to have struck a nerve with the Manipulus.{/n} "Nevertheless, I offer my sincere thanks to you for the invitation, as does my colleague. He does not often get the opportunity to socialise with laypersons of your status."

"I highly value the productivity of our conversations, Rogue Trader, though I must admit that I do not see the appeal of layperson humour." {n}Your mockery of Nuncius seems to have struck a nerve with the Manipulus.{/n} "Nevertheless, I offer my sincere thanks to you for the invitation, as does my colleague. He does not often get the opportunity to socialise with laypersons of your status."

languages.text: «Valoro en gran medida la productividad de nuestras conversaciones, Comerciante, aunque he de admitir que no le veo la gracia al humor de los laicos». {n}Parece que al burlarte de Nuncius le has tocado la fibra sensible al manipulus.{/n} «Aun así, le agradezco sinceramente la invitación, al igual que mi colega. No acostumbra a tener ocasión de socializar con laicos de su posición».
languages.original_text: "I highly value the productivity of our conversations, Rogue Trader, though I must admit that I do not see the appeal of layperson humour." {n}Your mockery of Nuncius seems to have struck a nerve with the Manipulus.{/n} "Nevertheless, I offer my sincere thanks to you for the invitation, as does my colleague. He does not often get the opportunity to socialise with laypersons of your status."

traits.locale_text: «Valoro en gran medida la productividad de nuestras conversaciones, Comerciante, aunque he de admitir que no le veo la gracia al humor de los laicos». {n}Parece que al burlarte de Nuncius le has tocado la fibra sensible al manipulus.{/n} «Aun así, le agradezco sinceramente la invitación, al igual que mi colega. No acostumbra a tener ocasión de socializar con laicos de su posición».

languages.text: “我非常看重我们谈话的成果，行商浪人，但我必须承认，我实在无法理解你们教外人士的幽默。”{n}你对努恩修斯的嘲弄似乎戳到了这位操纵者的痛处。{/n}“尽管如此，对于您的邀请，我与我的同僚谨致以诚挚的谢意。他很少有机会能与您这样身份的教外人士打交道。”
languages.original_text: "I highly value the productivity of our conversations, Rogue Trader, though I must admit that I do not see the appeal of layperson humour." {n}Your mockery of Nuncius seems to have struck a nerve with the Manipulus.{/n} "Nevertheless, I offer my sincere thanks to you for the invitation, as does my colleague. He does not often get the opportunity to socialise with laypersons of your status."

traits.locale_text: “我非常看重我们谈话的成果，行商浪人，但我必须承认，我实在无法理解你们教外人士的幽默。”{n}你对努恩修斯的嘲弄似乎戳到了这位操纵者的痛处。{/n}“尽管如此，对于您的邀请，我与我的同僚谨致以诚挚的谢意。他很少有机会能与您这样身份的教外人士打交道。”

languages.text: « J'apprécie grandement la productivité de nos conversations, mais je dois admettre que je ne comprends pas votre humour profane. » {n}Vous semblez avoir vexé le manipulus en vous moquant de Nuncius.{/n} « Je vous remercie malgré tout pour votre invitation, tout comme mon collègue. Il a rarement l'occasion de converser avec des profanes de votre rang. »
languages.original_text: "I highly value the productivity of our conversations, Rogue Trader, though I must admit that I do not see the appeal of layperson humour." {n}Your mockery of Nuncius seems to have struck a nerve with the Manipulus.{/n} "Nevertheless, I offer my sincere thanks to you for the invitation, as does my colleague. He does not often get the opportunity to socialise with laypersons of your status."

traits.locale_text: « J'apprécie grandement la productivité de nos conversations, mais je dois admettre que je ne comprends pas votre humour profane. » {n}Vous semblez avoir vexé le manipulus en vous moquant de Nuncius.{/n} « Je vous remercie malgré tout pour votre invitation, tout comme mon collègue. Il a rarement l'occasion de converser avec des profanes de votre rang. »

languages.text: "Konuşmalarımızın verimliliğine çok değer veriyorum Hür Tacir. Gelgelelim avam mizahının çekiciliğini göremediğimi itiraf etmeliyim." {n}Nuncius'la alay etmen, Manipülus'un sinirlerine dokunmuş gibi görünüyor.{/n} "Yine de meslektaşım gibi ben de davetiniz için içten teşekkürlerimi sunuyorum. Kendisi sizin statünüzdeki bir avamla sosyalleşme fırsatını pek sık bulamıyor."
languages.original_text: "I highly value the productivity of our conversations, Rogue Trader, though I must admit that I do not see the appeal of layperson humour." {n}Your mockery of Nuncius seems to have struck a nerve with the Manipulus.{/n} "Nevertheless, I offer my sincere thanks to you for the invitation, as does my colleague. He does not often get the opportunity to socialise with laypersons of your status."

traits.locale_text: "Konuşmalarımızın verimliliğine çok değer veriyorum Hür Tacir. Gelgelelim avam mizahının çekiciliğini göremediğimi itiraf etmeliyim." {n}Nuncius'la alay etmen, Manipülus'un sinirlerine dokunmuş gibi görünüyor.{/n} "Yine de meslektaşım gibi ben de davetiniz için içten teşekkürlerimi sunuyorum. Kendisi sizin statünüzdeki bir avamla sosyalleşme fırsatını pek sık bulamıyor."

languages.text: 「私は我々の会話の生産性を高く評価しています、ローグトレーダー。もっとも、世俗の方々のユーモアの魅力は理解しかねると認めざるを得ませんが」{n}あなたがヌンキウスをからかったことは、マニピュルスの神経に障ったようだ。{/n}「とはいえ、お招きいただいたことに、我が同僚ともども心より感謝申し上げます。彼は、あなたほどの地位にある世俗の方と交流する機会にそう恵まれてはおりませんので」
languages.original_text: "I highly value the productivity of our conversations, Rogue Trader, though I must admit that I do not see the appeal of layperson humour." {n}Your mockery of Nuncius seems to have struck a nerve with the Manipulus.{/n} "Nevertheless, I offer my sincere thanks to you for the invitation, as does my colleague. He does not often get the opportunity to socialise with laypersons of your status."

traits.locale_text: 「私は我々の会話の生産性を高く評価しています、ローグトレーダー。もっとも、世俗の方々のユーモアの魅力は理解しかねると認めざるを得ませんが」{n}あなたがヌンキウスをからかったことは、マニピュルスの神経に障ったようだ。{/n}「とはいえ、お招きいただいたことに、我が同僚ともども心より感謝申し上げます。彼は、あなたほどの地位にある世俗の方と交流する機会にそう恵まれてはおりませんので」

languages.text: "Ich schätze die Produktivität unserer Gespräche wirklich, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, wobei ich zugeben muss, dass ich dem Humor von Laien nichts abgewinnen kann." {n}Deine Spöttelei über Nuncius scheint bei dem Manipulus einen Nerv getroffen zu haben.{/n} "Nichtsdestotrotz möchte ich Euch genau wie mein Kollege aufrichtig für die Einladung danken. Er bekommt nicht oft die Gelegenheit, sich mit Laien Eures Ranges zu sozialisieren."
languages.original_text: "I highly value the productivity of our conversations, Rogue Trader, though I must admit that I do not see the appeal of layperson humour." {n}Your mockery of Nuncius seems to have struck a nerve with the Manipulus.{/n} "Nevertheless, I offer my sincere thanks to you for the invitation, as does my colleague. He does not often get the opportunity to socialise with laypersons of your status."

Er bekommt nicht oft die Gelegenheit, sich mit Laien Eures Ranges zu sozialisieren."
